category_sources: Official mpgtx homepage describes a command line MPEG audio/video/system file toolbox.
source_facts.description says toolbox to manipulate MPEG files.
docs_sources: Official homepage includes usage, syntax, modes, examples, and download information.
repo_sources: Official homepage links to browse CVS and gives anonymous CVS checkout details for mpgtx.
tags_sources: Official homepage lists split, join, info, demultiplex, and ID3 tag modes.
